ab: in’ananak uhu mzai mihu a numanuma.
naak a lhanaz zain Qaba Lhkapamumu, iaku thuini makthin a qamishan.
en: My name is Qaba Lhkapamumu, and I’m 10 years old.

ab: kuzan mihu a lhanaz?
naak a lhanaz zain Qaba Lhkapamumu.
lhkanantua wa azazak ihu?
en: What ethnic group are you from?

ab: tu Thau a azazak iaku.
mihu a taun az’az miniahala inai a thau qa?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎?
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: ua, iamin tata taun az’az Thau.
ch: B:是的，我們全家都是邵族人。
en: Yes, my whole family is Thau.

ab: mihu a taun az’az miniahala inai a thau qa?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎?
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: ani, tu Thau naak a ama, numa Shpuut naak a ina.
ch: B:不是，我的爸爸是邵族，我的媽媽是漢人。
en: No, my father is Thau, and my mother is Han Taiwanese.

ab: manu a azazak ihu?
Paruqatash Lhkapamumu a azazak iaku.
huya mihu a ama qa? pizaiza thithu a qamishan?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎? 他幾歲了?
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: makalhturuturuiza makthin thithu a qamishan.
huya mihu a ama qa? pizaiza thithu a qamishan?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎? 他幾歲了?
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: ani, naam a kataunan a tanatuqash, makashpashpatiza makthin thithu a qamishan.
ch: B:不是，他是我們部落的耆老，他80歲了。
en: No, he is an elder of our tribe. He is 80 years old.

ab: pizaiza s mihu a tantuqash ayuzi a minlhafut a qamishan?
makthin makashpashpat naak a tantuqash ayuzi a minlhafut a qamishan.
mihu a tantuqash ayuzi a minlhafut manasha qamishan mat ihu qa?
ch: A:你哥哥年紀比你大很多嗎?
en: Is your brother much older than you?

ab: shantaan iakin larima wa qamishan.
lakuza ihu rutaw?
tata shaba mashpatiz shian a rutaw iaku.
mindaaq iaku antu mriqaz ihun, minrutawiza ihu qa?
ch: A:好久不見，你是不是長高了?
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. Have you grown taller?

ab: ua, tata shaba maturuziza shian a rutaw iaku.
minramuiza ihu qa?
ani, muririw ihu mriqaz.
minshiqarmaniza ihu qa?
ani, minramuiza iaku.
minramuiza ihu qa?
ua, maturuziza iaku qung tingting thuini.
